nodes.title: User Prompt
widgets_values: Portrait of Saber in red coat beside a Mercedes-AMG GT at Piazza San Marco Venice at blue hour, editorial fashion photography

The O1 model is trained under the following resolutions:
| Width | Height | Category |
|-------|--------|------------|
| 2048 | 2048 | Square |
| 2304 | 1728 | Landscape |
| 2304 | 1792 | Landscape |
| 2496 | 1664 | Landscape |
| 2560 | 1440 | Landscape |
| 3104 | 1312 | Landscape |
| 1728 | 2304 | Portrait |
| 1792 | 2304 | Portrait |
| 1664 | 2496 | Portrait |
| 1440 | 2560 | Portrait |
| 1312 | 3104 | Portrait |
For more information on training, check out the [Training Documentation](https://github.com/Saganaki22/HiDream_O1-ComfyUI/blob/main/docs/HIDREAM_O1_TRAINING.md).
